observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.name: MagicHub / Mandarin Chinese Conversational Speech Corpus - Web Meeting
observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.reason_not_whitelisted: Requires stricter human review because the license is non-commercial/no-derivatives and the source may require website access; do not use for automatic download, extraction, transformation, commercial validation, or product-value gates.

observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.name: MagicData-RAMC Conversational Speech / OpenSLR SLR123
observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.reason_not_whitelisted: Observed as a conversational supplement, but the license is non-commercial/no-derivatives and package size is still large; do not use for automatic download, extraction, transformation, commercial validation, or product-value gates.

observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.name: MISP-Meeting Corpus
observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.reason_not_whitelisted: Strong meeting-acoustics candidate, but the license is non-commercial and requires separate human/legal review; do not use for automatic download, automatic evaluation, commercial validation, or product-value gates.

observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.name: Mozilla Common Voice zh-CN
observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.reason_not_whitelisted: Legally friendly baseline candidate, but it is read short speech rather than meeting speech and the current zh-CN package is large; do not use for automatic download, automatic evaluation, or product-value gates.

observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.name: PyCon China technical conference recordings
observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.reason_not_whitelisted: High domain relevance for Chinese technical vocabulary, but public viewing does not grant audio extraction, transcription, derivative processing, or commercial evaluation rights; do not use for automatic download, automatic evaluation, scraping, transformation, or product-value gates without written authorization and a human transcript plan.

observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.name: QCon / InfoQ technical conference recordings
observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.reason_not_whitelisted: High domain relevance for architecture and engineering-practice vocabulary, but the recordings are platform/course content and may have speaker or enterprise publication restrictions; do not use for automatic download, automatic evaluation, scraping, transformation, or product-value gates without written authorization and a human transcript plan.

observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.name: WenetSpeech / OpenSLR SLR121
observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.license: CC BY 4.0 metadata with platform-audio provenance caveat
observed_but_not_whitelisted_sources.reason_not_whitelisted: Excluded because the corpus relies on YouTube and podcast source audio provenance; do not use for automatic download, automatic evaluation, scraping, extraction, transformation, commercial validation, or product-value gates.

sources.name: AISHELL-4 / OpenSLR SLR111
sources.recommended_first_subset: test metadata and a bounded small sample extraction plan only
sources.use_boundary: meeting acoustics, far-field, overlap, speaker turns, diarization risk
sources.not_for: product value validation or software-engineering gap usefulness proof

sources.name: AliMeeting / OpenSLR SLR119
sources.recommended_first_subset: Eval metadata and a bounded small sample extraction plan only
sources.use_boundary: real meeting ASR, near-field/far-field contrast, overlap and speaker turn behavior
sources.not_for: product value validation or software-engineering gap usefulness proof

sources.name: AISHELL-1 / OpenSLR SLR33
sources.recommended_first_subset: metadata and a bounded small sample extraction plan only
sources.use_boundary: basic Mandarin ASR smoke and model/runtime sanity checks
sources.not_for: meeting acoustics, speaker overlap, or product value validation
